---
applyTo: "study-materials/**"
description: Workflow guidance for generating study materials, quizzes, bibliographies, and interactive artifacts.
---

# Study Material Workflow Guidance

When creating or updating material under `study-materials/`:

1. Read the relevant local proposal or existing notes first.
2. Check whether the topic is foundational, integrative, or advanced.
3. Keep the material modular and reusable.
4. Do not mix raw literature dumps with finished teaching notes.
5. Keep bibliography or source notes close to the material they support, or centralize them under `study-materials/references/`.
6. Prefer short, composable files over one monolithic document.
7. Make assessment files and answer keys separate.
8. If you generate an interactive artifact, add a short README with purpose, run instructions, and limits.
